bs_description: Email addresses the bot should respond to, comma-separated (e.g. sales@yourdomain.com). All other emails to your domains are logged as CRM activities only.

bs_default: If the prospect asks to speak with a human or you can't answer their question, find the right person on Slack and hand off with context.
bs_description: When and how to escalate conversations to a human sales rep
Name or contact information of the person to escalate unresolved sales questions to
Comma-separated list of External Data Source (EDS) IDs this bot should search when answering prospect questions. Leave empty to search all workspace EDS.
